title: Annual Leave Entitlement and Vacation Booking
text:
Q: What is my annual leave entitlement and how do I book my vacation?
A: Employees are entitled to 20 days of paid annual leave per year, in addition to public holidays. Leave is accrued on a pro-rata basis, meaning that if you join the company mid-year, your entitlement will be adjusted accordingly. To book your vacation, please submit a leave request through the HR portal at least four weeks in advance of your desired leave dates. This allows for adequate staffing and planning. Once your request is submitted, your manager will review it and respond within five business days. If you have any questions or need assistance, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com. Remember, unused leave can be carried over to the next year, but must be taken within 18 months of the end of the leave year.
